name: Fresh Tomatoes
description: Vine-ripened organic tomatoes, perfect for salads, sauces, and sandwiches. Locally sourced from trusted farms.

name: Golden Potatoes
description: Premium golden potatoes ideal for roasting, mashing, or baking. Firm texture with buttery flavor.

name: Red Onions
description: Fresh red onions with a mild, sweet flavor. Perfect for cooking, grilling, or salads.

name: Fresh Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, washed and ready to eat. Rich in iron and vitamins.

name: Bell Peppers Mix
description: Colorful mix of red, yellow, and green bell peppers. Crunchy and sweet, great for stir-fry.

name: Organic Bananas
description: Naturally ripened organic bananas. A perfect snack packed with potassium and energy.

name: Royal Gala Apples
description: Crisp and sweet Royal Gala apples. Handpicked for premium quality and freshness.

name: Valencia Oranges
description: Juicy Valencia oranges bursting with natural sweetness. Perfect for juicing or snacking.

name: Fresh Strawberries
description: Sweet, ripe strawberries hand-selected for quality. Perfect for desserts and smoothies.

name: Ripe Mangoes
description: Alphonso mangoes with rich, creamy flesh and tropical aroma. The king of fruits.

name: Whole Milk
description: Farm-fresh whole milk, pasteurized and homogenized. Rich and creamy for everyday use.

name: Free-Range Eggs
description: Farm-fresh free-range eggs from pasture-raised hens. Rich golden yolks.

name: Salted Butter
description: European-style salted butter made from fresh cream. Perfect for cooking and baking.

name: Cheddar Cheese
description: Aged sharp cheddar cheese with a rich, bold flavor. Perfect for sandwiches and melting.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick, creamy Greek yogurt with high protein content. Plain and unsweetened.

name: Artisan Sourdough
description: Handcrafted sourdough bread with a crispy crust and soft, tangy interior. Baked fresh daily.

name: Croissants
description: Flaky, buttery French croissants baked to golden perfection. Best enjoyed warm.

name: Multigrain Bread
description: Hearty multigrain bread with seeds and whole grains. High in fiber and nutrition.

name: Orange Juice
description: 100% pure squeezed orange juice with no added sugar. Refreshing and vitamin-packed.

name: Green Tea
description: Premium Japanese green tea leaves. Delicate flavor with natural antioxidants.

name: Arabica Coffee
description: Single-origin Arabica coffee beans, medium roast. Rich aroma with chocolate notes.

name: Basmati Rice
description: Aged premium Basmati rice with extra-long grains. Fluffy and aromatic when cooked.

name: Organic Sugar
description: Unrefined organic cane sugar with natural golden color and subtle molasses flavor.

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil from Mediterranean groves. Perfect for cooking and dressings.

name: Organic Honey
description: Raw, unfiltered organic honey from wildflower meadows. Natural sweetener with health benefits.

name: Dark Chocolate
description: 72% cocoa dark chocolate made from sustainably sourced cacao beans. Rich and indulgent.

name: Fresh Broccoli
description: Crisp, green broccoli crowns rich in vitamins C and K. Perfect steamed or in stir-fry.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Natural sparkling mineral water with fine bubbles. Refreshing and zero calories.
